blocks.content: Two weeks later Eli pulled him aside at the bike rack.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: You're going to California in August. She's going to Minnesota in August.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I'm not going to watch you leave without saying it. I'm telling you right now. I cannot watch that happen.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I didn't say it was simple. I said say it.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: And then what. We're leaving. We're going to different coasts.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: And that's hard. But it's not an excuse to say nothing.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I was at homecoming. I've been watching you two since eighth grade. She does.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: You've got six months before August. Don't waste all of them.
Eli unlocked his bike. Said nothing else. He didn't need to.
